source: Comandante C40 ~30µm/click; community V60 range 21–25 clicks (multiple forum references)

Baratza Encore 40mm conical 40-step; community V60 range 18–22 (grinders.js calibration)

DF64 Gen2 64mm flat stepless 0–90; V60 anchor ~55 (50–65) per grinders.js sources
